name: cancerdao-skills
description: OPL for Cancer — a patient's own AI scientist team, installable as one plugin.

plugins.name: opl-cancer
plugins.description: OPL for Cancer (CancerDAO) — PI Sid + 20 expert archetypes + IRB-substitute auditor Henry produce a PMID-anchored, three-tier-labelled research brief from a patient's records. Not treatment advice; the patient is sole decision authority.
